This attribute displays Portfolio information for FM, directly flowing from Murex/PCDB.  The SF tagging is based on Portfolio Mapping in MFU, there are defined set of Portfolio to be treated as SF transaction, and these Portfolio are input to MFU.  PMI batch tags transaction based on the defined Portfolio for each transaction.

column7: Pure Play Type, Pure play Classification
column8:
Pure Play Category Defines whether the Client is Clean Tech, Micro Finance or Other Pureplay.
Tagging of Category is also based on MFU definition for each client.

This attribute defines whether the transaction is Pureplay or not, by tagging PurePlay Flag with "Y" & "N".  Y represents the transaction is Pureplay clients transaction.
The Y or N tagging is based on  MFU Pureplay clients lists, the tagging happens for the transactions from TP based on the list.

Differentiates the given transaction is UOP or KPI
Tagging of Category is also based on MFU definition for each client/product/strategy/typology/portfolio/Limit/transaction.

Defines the Sustainable Finance labels:
Green, Sustainable, Social, SLL, Transition, SLB, Blue & Green, 
Green Bond

Tagging of SF Sub Category is also based on MFU definition for each client/product/strategy/typology/portfolio/Limit/transaction.

This attribute displays Strategy information for FM, directly flowing from Murex/PCDB.  The SF tagging is based on strategy Mapping in MFU, there are defined set of Strategy to be treated as SF transaction, and these strategis are input to MFU.  PMI batch tags transaction based on the defined strategy for each transaction.

This attribute defines whether the transaction is SF enable or not, Sustainable Flag with "Y" & "N".  Y represents the transaction is Sustainable transaction.
The Y or N tagging is based on data from TP.  OTP, DTP, OLTP transactions flow in with Sustainable Flag tagged directly.  Based on MFU the tagging happens for rest of the transaction.  The MFU tagging is based on Client, Limit & contract reference, Strategy, Typology & portfolio.

This attribute displays Typology information for FM, directly flowing from Murex/PCDB.  The SF tagging is based on Typology Mapping in MFU, there are defined set of Typology to be treated as SF transaction, and these Typologies are input to MFU.  PMI batch tags transaction based on the defined Typology for each transaction.
This displays the Ultimate Parent Location aligned with the 'Ultimate Parent Location' attribute in PMI.
